barRaise.topFinding: Strongest cycle in this review run: almost the entire 2026-06-11 action list shipped. v0.98.4 closed three carried mediums in one patch (CLAUDE.md native-3D primer and 32x16 tile fix, a Native 3D Render Rework Roadmap milestone, and world_3d.gd SAVE_VERSION), and v0.98.5 retired the dormant 2D layer outright - source/buildings, units, enemies, world, the 2D fog and wave_director, and the enemy_pool/projectile_pool autoloads are gone, collapsing the long-standing dual-path risk to a single pooled enemy_field_3d. The dirty-tree-with-a-bumped-pill flag is cleared too: HEAD, the GDD pill, and the dashboard JSON all read v0.98.5. Two items remain. The 3D crowd has still never been profiled-and-logged and is now the only enemy path carrying the S-34 hundreds-to-thousands target. And the v0.98.5 retirement left the GDD architecture-tree and section-16 rendering prose describing a live dual 2D/3D path, including an instruction to run scripts/audit-dual-path.ps1 - a script that same commit deleted. Direction sound, commit hygiene recovered; the work now is profiling the only render path and finishing the doc cleanup the retirement started.
